mainEntity.name: Am I still covered by workers comp if the falling object was kind of my own fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, workers compensation in Utah and Idaho is a no-fault system. You are generally eligible for benefits even if your own mistake contributed to the injury, provided you were acting within the scope of your employment.
